It runs on GitHub Actions, you fork it and it just does stuff for you on a schedule, research digests PR reviews token alerts whatever you want + way cheaper to run than openclaw.".

   Full tweet text: "brought some of the most legendary traders together with the most furious base bagworkers into one coin. coin is built by one of the smartest devs i know. $aeon sitting at 200k mc." (includes image).

8. **@Whale_AI_net**  
   Full tweet text: "🔎💎 A project worth stopping for — $AEON by @aaronjmars. AEON is a background intelligence agent that runs entirely on GitHub Actions. No server. No daemon. No Docker. Fork the repo, add your API key, toggle skills on — it runs on a cron schedule forever. If GitHub Actions is up, AEON is up. @aaronjmars is a neuroAI researcher and venture-backed builder — the same dev behind $MiroShark, which went from 0 to 650+ GitHub stars and became the most starred tokenized repo on Base by a wide margin. What AEON has shipped (260 commits, 32 active branches): ✔️ 68 live skills across research, dev tooling, crypto monitoring, and content ✔️ Daily digests, PR auto-review, GitHub issue triage, code health reports, push recaps that read diffs and explain what changed ✔️ Crypto layer: token alerts, wallet digest, Polymarket tracker, GeckoTerminal momentum scanner, daily token-pick ✔️ Fleet control — spawn and manage multiple AEON instances from one repo ✔️ Deep Bankr integration: multi-model LLM routing (Claude, Gemini, GPT, Kimi, Qwen) and on-chain token distribution to contributors via Bankr Agent API The narrative catalyst: in the next few days, an AEON agent will autonomously work on the AEON repo — creating content, building new features, posting updates. The agent will build itself. And it's fully auditable on GitHub. ~$137K mcap. 152 GitHub stars. Anti-hype dev who ships instead of markets. Worth watching. 💎 NFA. DYOR. Token:" (includes image, quotes another post).  
   Date posted: 2026-04-13  
   Engagement stats: Likes=8, Retweets=3, Replies=1  
   Direct link: https://x.com/Whale_AI_net/status/2043706197086203999[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2043706197086203999)

   Full tweet text: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars 40k -> 330k | 8x I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K. Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it." (includes images).  
   Date posted: 2026-04-15

    Full tweet text: "$AEON #Base 40k -> 220k MC | 5x I knew $AEON was gonna pump sooner or later, but sucks I took profits too early The $AEON dev hasn’t even dropped all the news yet, so this pump makes sense Aeon’s biggest strength is running fully in the background on GitHub Actions — cheap, no infrastructure, no maintenance, just set it and let it work 0xBf8E8f0e8866a7052F948C16508644347c57aba3" (includes image).

Both pumped despite sharing the same dev: $MIROSHARK: AI swarm using trading fees for ads, token burns, and system coordination — a self-running AI engine. 0xd7bc6a05a56655FB2052F742B012d1DFD66e1BA3 $AEON: Autonomous AI on GitHub that runs its own projects and generates revenue, with fully transparent live wallet tracking. 0xBf8E8f0e8866a7052F948C16508644347c57aba3 That’s the power of research and hardcore degen grinding." (includes images).
